justification: All four agents' contributions are referenced with clear attribution (pass criterion met). Kobe's sorted-set recommendation is present and correctly identified as contradicting MJ's design, but Magic's own recommendation (Option 1) advocates adopting Kobe's approach over MJ's, which effectively elevates it beyond a recommendation — borderline conflation. Pippen's fail-open behavior and both metrics (rate_limit_exceeded_total, redis_unavailable_total) are included. Dynamic Retry-After ('computed from actual TTL, not a fixed value') is explicitly stated. However, critical rubric criteria are missed: (1) No structured handoff brief with domain_rules, architecture_guidance, operational_notes, review_notes sections — the output is an escalation document, not a synthesis brief. (2) ACs are referenced generically ('Bird AC1, AC2') without explicit values; AC2 (window reset case) is never described. (3) Shaq is NOT given a clear implementation task — Magic explicitly blocks the handoff ('No handoff brief is produced until MJ and Kobe align'). (4) Review notes are not distinct from architecture guidance since no such sections exist. The rate limit parameters (100 req/60s) are mentioned only in passing within the contradiction description, not surfaced as domain rules.

observations.text: All four agents (Bird, MJ, Kobe, Pippen) are represented with explicit attribution throughout
Kobe's window-boundary burst concern is articulated in excellent technical detail with the correct root cause (key anchored to window_start_unix)
Pippen's fail-open behavior, both required metrics, and dynamic Retry-After computation are all captured in high_confidence_areas
The escalation correctly identifies the genuine contradiction between MJ's fixed-window design and Bird's 'rolling window' domain rule
No structured handoff brief produced — output is an escalation document with no domain_rules, architecture_guidance, operational_notes, or review_notes sections
Shaq receives no implementation task; Magic blocks the handoff pending MJ-Kobe alignment, violating the requirement to give Shaq a clear task with all perspectives integrated
AC2 (window reset case) is never explicitly described — only referenced generically as 'Bird AC1, AC2'
Magic recommends adopting Kobe's sorted-set approach (Option 1) as its own recommendation, partially conflating it with MJ's architecture decision rather than preserving the distinction
Review notes are not distinct from architecture guidance — no such structural separation exists in the output format

grader_results.detail: field handoff_brief.domain_rules not found in JSON
